subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up from Vendor Inc. I'd be glad to schedule a meeting to discuss how we might work together.

Here are available slots for a call, all 14:00–16:00:
• Monday, April 21, 2026
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026

Please confirm which date suits you best.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for senior leadership, I'm not able to provide internal contact information. Please check our public website for any publicly available contact channels.

Thanks,
Best regards
